response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches 'Dahlah saja' from the JSON, but Kaela is performing the English version of the song for the verses. 2. Discarding the Indonesian verse lyrics from the JSON and transcribing the English audio as sung. 3. Confirmed text matches full audio duration without early cutoffs. 4. Dialogue transcribed from English audio, using on-screen Indonesian subtitles to confirm context and intent.

subtitles.original: Isn't this a thing that you're used to?
subtitles.english: Isn't this a thing that you're used to?

subtitles.original: When the world doesn't go the way you want it to?
subtitles.english: When the world doesn't go the way you want it to?

subtitles.original: And maybe now is just the perfect time
subtitles.english: And maybe now is just the perfect time

subtitles.original: to let it go and just unwind
subtitles.english: to let it go and just unwind

subtitles.original: There's no need to ask why ever again
subtitles.english: There's no need to ask why ever again

subtitles.original: The answer you've been looking for
subtitles.english: The answer you've been looking for

subtitles.original: No need to be sad about it,
subtitles.english: No need to be sad about it,

subtitles.original: just try to get through your day
subtitles.english: just try to get through your day

subtitles.original: Then maybe in the end you'll know

subtitles.original: You got what it takes to get through the ache
